message.content:
I need to understand the DS components used by the MyOrdersRewardProgram screen. Search for and read:

1. Check what CardVehicleTags looks like - search for "CardVehicleTags" in node_modules/@semparar/design-system-app
2. Check what Image component looks like from DS
3. Check what Skeleton looks like from DS
4. Check the store slice for orders/vouchers - look in src/services/ for anything related to "orders", "voucher", or "myOrders"
5. Read src/services/store/slices.ts to understand store structure
6. Look for any data files related to orders (like src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/data/ or similar)

Read the actual JS source files in node_modules/@semparar/design-system-app/src/ for CardVehicleTags if available.

This is research only - do not write any code.

content.text:
⊰IUTP

I'll search for the Design System components and store structure used by the MyOrdersRewardProgram screen. Let me start by exploring multiple areas in parallel.

    30→  colorLink = color,
    31→  colorBold = color,
    32→  colorHighlight,
    33→  testID = 'DS-text-core',
    34→  index,
    35→  disabled,
    36→}: TextPropsComponent) {
    37→  const textColor = (
    38→    isLink: boolean,
    39→    isBold: boolean,
    40→    isHighlight: boolean,
    41→  ): PropsTokenColorsCore => {
    42→    if (colorHighlight && isHighlight) return colorHighlight;
    43→    if (colorBold && isBold) return colorBold;
    44→    if (colorLink && isLink) return colorLink;
    45→
    46→    return color;
    47→  };
